subcodes.title: Tafsir-i-Suratu'l-Qadar II
subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath ever been and shall ever be, Whose existence preceded all that was before, with naught beside Him to be mentioned, Who endureth even as He hath always been [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله المتقدس المنیع. سبحان الذی لم یزل و لا یزال کان وجوده قبل القبل بلا ذکر شیء عنده و لایزال انه هو کائن بمثل ماقد کان
subcodes.subjects: @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @Night of Power (Laylat al-Qadr), @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @the Twelfth Imam; the Qa'im
